mustKeep: Confirmed business facts and explicit unknowns
Owned local assets and owned motion with visible source without JavaScript
No emoji or visible dash characters
mustFix: Remove unsupported neighborhood and local-scope claims, especially “Built for the neighborhood.”
Replace the suburban streetscape with a floral or studio-detail image coherent with the warm still-life photography.
Increase phone body, planning, context, navigation, and footer text sizes; loosen the context paragraph leading.
Recompose the phone header so navigation does not occupy a cramped vertical strip beside the brand.
Reduce excess vertical padding in the desktop and tablet confirmation section.
preserve: The split-screen hero composition and deliberate floral crop.
The exact business-name headline and restrained two-word section headings.
The warm cream, deep ink green, and muted floral palette.
The editorial serif and compact uppercase section labels.
The complete three-item numbered planning list.
The single nonessential motion treatment with reduced-motion and no-JavaScript fallbacks.
